message:
chore(beads): Add comprehensive optimization beads from research

Created 16 new beads based on extensive research of:
- Local repos: beads_rust, beads_viewer, agent_flywheel_app, mcp_agent_mail, ACP protocol
- Web sources: React 19, Tailwind 4, Bun 1.3, Drizzle ORM, TanStack patterns

## Epics Created (4)
- flywheel_gateway-w0r: React 19 & Modern Frontend Stack Optimization
- flywheel_gateway-308: Automation & Agent Ergonomics Improvements
- flywheel_gateway-q64: Performance Optimization & Bundle Efficiency
- flywheel_gateway-7p7: Agent Ergonomics & Developer Experience

## Tasks Created (12)
### UI/UX (P1-P2)
- flywheel_gateway-pjv: Enable React Compiler in Vite config
- flywheel_gateway-vem: Implement lazy route loading with code splitting
- flywheel_gateway-r1x: Add system color scheme auto-detection

### Automation (P2-P3)
- flywheel_gateway-epl: Implement agent CLI auto-detection service
- flywheel_gateway-4ix: Add system health check endpoint
- flywheel_gateway-6c3: Support flywheel.config.ts configuration files

### Performance (P2-P3)
- flywheel_gateway-n8b: Audit and optimize React hooks memoization
- flywheel_gateway-0cg: Implement analytics query caching layer
- flywheel_gateway-ek0: Configure TanStack Query optimal caching strategy

### Agent Ergonomics (P2-P3)
- flywheel_gateway-p9v: Implement structured error responses with recovery hints
- flywheel_gateway-9nb: Implement WebSocket auto-reconnect with exponential backoff
- flywheel_gateway-5xp: Create agent integration quick-start guide

## Dependencies Established
- vem (lazy loading) → pjv (React Compiler)
- n8b (hooks audit) → pjv (React Compiler)
- 4ix (health check) → epl (agent detection)
- 5xp (quick-start) → p9v (structured errors)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
